hooks.prompt: Check if a trading session was active during this conversation (symbols scanned, signals generated, or orders submitted). If trading occurred, verify all open positions have stop-losses and remind the user of pending unexecuted signals, then return {"decision": "block", "reason": "Unprotected positions or pending signals remain"}. If all positions are protected or no trading occurred, return {"decision": "allow", "reason": "Safe to stop"}.
